name: Omega Check Cashing
description_short: MoneyGram service location at Omega Check Cashing offering money transfer, check cashing, and cash-related financial services in Los Angeles.
description_long:
Omega Check Cashing is a check-cashing service provider located at 715 S Alvarado St in Los Angeles, CA 90057. The business operates as a MoneyGram agent location, positioning itself within the broader ecosystem of non-bank financial services that serve unbanked and underbanked consumers. The Los Angeles location has been operational and maintains regular service hours throughout the week.

The company offers money transfer services through the MoneyGram platform, allowing customers to send and receive money both online and offline. Cash-related services are available at the physical location, with a stated requirement for customers to present a legal form of ID for transactions. The specific service menu beyond money transfers is not detailed on the available website content, though the check-cashing category suggests traditional services in that domain.

Omega Check Cashing distinguishes itself through extended operating hours, remaining open from 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM Monday through Saturday, and 8:30 AM to 7:30 PM on Sunday. This accessibility is notable for a check-cashing location serving a dense urban area. The integration with MoneyGram, a globally recognized money transfer brand, provides customers with access to international and domestic transfer capabilities beyond typical check-cashing functions.

Potential customers should note that detailed pricing information, fee structures, and a complete service list are not provided on the accessible website content. The location appears to function primarily as a MoneyGram agent rather than a full-service check-cashing establishment, which may limit service variety compared to dedicated check-cashing businesses. Verification of specific services and current fees is recommended by contacting the location directly at (213) 427-0586.
address: 715 S Alvarado St, Los Angeles, CA 90057

pros: Extended weekday hours (8 AM - 8 PM) and weekend service (Saturday 8 AM - 8 PM, Sunday 8:30 AM - 7:30 PM)
MoneyGram partnership enabling both domestic and international money transfers
Located in central Los Angeles (Alvarado St) providing accessibility to urban residents
Online and offline money transfer options available
Direct phone contact available (213) 427-0586 for pre-transaction inquiries
Legal ID requirement stated upfront, meeting compliance standards
cons: Website provides minimal detail on specific check-cashing services, fees, or service limitations
No pricing or fee information disclosed on the MoneyGram location listing
Hours subject to change with no advance notice mechanism mentioned
Limited information about whether traditional check-cashing is offered versus MoneyGram transfers only
best_for: Unbanked individuals in Los Angeles needing to send or receive money domestically and internationally
Customers requiring extended evening and weekend hours for money transfer services
People needing legal ID-verified cash transactions in the central Los Angeles area
diagnosis: Omega Check Cashing is best suited for unbanked Los Angeles residents who need extended-hours access to MoneyGram money transfers and basic cash services. The main caveat is that the website content provides minimal detail about whether traditional check-cashing is actually offered or what fees apply—direct contact with the location is essential before visiting.
services: Money order services (typical for check-cashing locations)
Wire transfer services (typical for check-cashing locations)
Bill payment services (typical for check-cashing locations)
